Plugins.name: Better Plugins Manager
Plugins.desc: Plugin Manager: Simplify, Enhance, Personalize | 插件管理器：简化操作、增强功能、个性化设置

Plugins.name: Advanced Canvas
Plugins.desc: Supercharge your canvas experience! Create presentations, flowcharts and more!

Plugins.name: Super Daily Notes
Plugins.desc: A plugin for managing daily notes with schedule, events, habits, journal, statistics, and floating timer views in Obsidian.

Plugins.name: Anchor Link Display Text
Plugins.desc: Automatically uses the linked heading as the display text for anchor links.

Plugins.name: aDHL
Plugins.desc: Create pretty static highlighters from search or regEx. Group by tag and set commands for toggling. Based on Dynamic Highlights.

Plugins.name: AnyBlock
Plugins.desc: You can flexibility to create a 'Block' by some means. It also provides some useful features, like `list to table`.

Plugins.name: Beautiful Mermaid Renderer
Plugins.desc: Render Mermaid diagrams with beautiful-mermaid SVG output and theme variables.

Plugins.name: Better Heading Link
Plugins.desc: Automatically repair internal links to headings and blocks.

Plugins.name: Better Links
Plugins.desc: Enhance link editing experience with floating editor popover. Click links to edit their display text and URL with quick action buttons.

Plugins.name: Better Search Views
Plugins.desc: Outliner-like breadcrumb trees for search, backlinks and embedded queries

Plugins.name: Block Link Plus
Plugins.desc: Logseq-like outliner for scoped files, block link commands, blp-view query rendering, and inline edit for embeds.

Plugins.name: Breadcrumbs
Plugins.desc: Add structured hierarchies to your notes.

Plugins.name: Callout menu
Plugins.desc: Adds some extra options to callouts context menu and allows you to add your own custom callouts.

Plugins.name: Canvas Loom
Plugins.desc: Split, sort, merge, preview, and clean up Canvas cards. Supports English and Simplified Chinese.

Plugins.name: CardNote
Plugins.desc: Help you quickly extract your thoughts in the Canvas and Excalidraw

Plugins.name: Checkbox Style Menu
Plugins.desc: Provides an intuitive menu for quickly changing checkbox styles.

Plugins.name: Chinese Calendar
Plugins.desc: 符合中国习惯的日历，可以显示农历、节日、调休、节气等信息，支持月视图和年视图切换，支持点击日期创建笔记，支持使用QuickAdd插件创建笔记。

Plugins.name: Chronology
Plugins.desc: Provides a calendar and a timeline of the notes creation and modification

Plugins.name: Chronos Timeline
Plugins.desc: Render interactive timelines in your notes from Markdown.

Plugins.name: Simplified Chinese Word Splitting
Plugins.desc: Adds Simplified Chinese word splitting support for the editor and Vim mode.

Plugins.name: Commander
Plugins.desc: Customize your workspace by adding commands everywhere, create Macros and supercharge your mobile toolbar.

Plugins.name: Code Files
Plugins.desc: Edit Code Files in Obsidian with VSCode's powerful Monaco Editor

Plugins.name: Codeblock Customizer
Plugins.desc: This Obsidian plugin lets you customize your codeblocks in editing, and reading mode as well.

Plugins.name: Colored Tags
Plugins.desc: Colorizes tags in different colors. Colors of nested tags are mixed with the root tag to improve readability. Text color contrast is automatically matched to comply with AA level of WCAG 2.1.

Plugins.name: Colorful StickyNotes
Plugins.desc: Floating colorful sticky notes in your vault.

Plugins.name: Components
Plugins.desc: create component for your obsidian

Plugins.name: 复制图文 (Copy Image Text)
Plugins.desc: Copy note content (including text and images) to clipboard. 复制笔记内容（包括文本和图片）到剪贴板。

Plugins.name: Copy As PlainText
Plugins.desc: Copy selections or entire notes as plain text. Both commands are available in the command palette; selection copy is also in the context menu.

Plugins.name: Image Context Menus
Plugins.desc: Copy to clipboard, Copy URL, Open in default app, Show in system explorer, Reveal file in navigation, Open in new tab, Rename context menus for images.

Plugins.name: Creases
Plugins.desc: Tools for efficiently folding Markdown sections.

Plugins.name: CSS Inlay Colors
Plugins.desc: Show inline color hints for CSS colors

Plugins.name: Dashboard navigator
Plugins.desc: Vault dashboard and navigator. Show recent files by type, files per day, week, month, search files by name, date, tags and more.

Plugins.name: Dataview
Plugins.desc: Complex data views for the data-obsessed.

Plugins.name: Decks
Plugins.desc: Spaced repetition flashcards with FSRS algorithm. Supports cloze deletions and image occlusion using native markdown.

Plugins.name: DOCX Exporter
Plugins.desc: Export notes to Microsoft Word docx files with mobile devices support.

Plugins.name: Docxer
Plugins.desc: Import Word files easily. Adds a preview mode for .docx files and the ability to convert them to markdown (.md) files.

Plugins.name: Draw in Canvas
Plugins.desc: Draw freehand annotations on JSON Canvas files.

Plugins.name: Dynamic Outline
Plugins.desc: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.

Plugins.name: Editor Width Slider
Plugins.desc: Customize Obsidian's editor width with a slider for a tailored editing experience.

Plugins.name: Execute Code
Plugins.desc: Allows you to execute code snippets within a note. Support C, C++, Python, R, JavaScript, TypeScript, LaTeX, SQL, and many more.

Plugins.name: Extended Graph
Plugins.desc: Extends the features of the core Graph view, display images, manage states, remove links, change node shapes, and more.

Plugins.name: External Rename Handler
Plugins.desc: Handles renames made outside of the app

Plugins.name: Focus Time
Plugins.desc: Track the time spent on each note and visualize the data.

Plugins.name: Folder notes
Plugins.desc: Create notes within folders that can be accessed without collapsing the folder, similar to the functionality offered in Notion.

Plugins.name: Folders to Graph
Plugins.desc: Display your vault folder structure into your graphs.

Plugins.name: Format with Prettier
Plugins.desc: Format files in your vault using Prettier.

Plugins.name: Gistr
Plugins.desc: Integrate Opengist and Github gists into your notes, allowing you to create, update, and share between your notes and gist services

Plugins.name: GridExplorer
Plugins.desc: Browse note files in a grid view.

Plugins.name: Heading Decorator
Plugins.desc: Implement displaying specific content around headings based on their levels.

Plugins.name: Hot Reload
Plugins.desc: Automatically reload in-development plugins when their files are changed

Plugins.name: HTML Docs
Plugins.desc: View local .html files in sandboxed tabs, embeds, and Canvas cards.

Plugins.name: Html Server
Plugins.desc: This plugin lets you spin up a local http server to access your vault via a web browser from any device in your network.

Plugins.name: InlineAI
Plugins.desc: AI-powered suggestions, contextual edits, and advanced text transformations directly into your editor.

Plugins.name: Kanban Bases View
Plugins.desc: A kanban-style drag-and-drop custom view for Bases.

Plugins.name: Keyboard Analyzer
Plugins.desc: See and analyze your keyboard hotkeys and shortcuts

Plugins.name: Keyshots
Plugins.desc: Add classic hotkey/shortcuts commands from popular IDEs like Visual Studio Code or JetBrains Family.

Plugins.name: Lineage
Plugins.desc: Edit Markdown in a keyboard-centric Miller columns interface. Inspired by Gingko Writer.

Plugins.name: Link Navigation
Plugins.desc: Navigate between incoming links (inlinks), outgoing links (outlinks) N levels deep. Links from Canvas are also supported.

Plugins.name: Linked Note Exporter
Plugins.desc: Export note with all its attachments and linked notes.

Plugins.name: Links
Plugins.desc: Manipulate links

Plugins.name: Markdown Viewer
Plugins.desc: Markdown to perfect Word in one click — Mermaid, Vega, drawio, canvas, Infographic, Graphviz, LaTeX (editable), code highlighting, local processing.

Plugins.name: Markitdown File Converter
Plugins.desc: Convert PDFs, Office documents, images, and other file formats to Markdown using Microsoft's Markitdown tool

Plugins.name: Diagram Popup
Plugins.desc: Show diagrams, from Mermaid, PlantUML, Graphviz and so on, in a draggable and zoomable popup

Plugins.name: Messager
Plugins.desc: Save messages into vault which sending through WeChat / HTTP API / Email

Plugins.name: Modal Opener
Plugins.desc: Open files and links in modal windows, or create and edit compatible files in modal windows.

Plugins.name: Modal forms
Plugins.desc: Define forms for filling data that you will be able to open from anywhere you can run JS

Plugins.name: Multiple Notes Outline
Plugins.desc: Add custom views which show outlines of multiple notes with headings, links, tags and list items.

Plugins.name: MySnippets
Plugins.desc: MySnippets is a plugin that adds a status bar menu allowing the user to quickly toggle their snippets on and off 🖌.

Plugins.name: Nav Link Header
Plugins.desc: Display navigation links at the top of the notes.

Plugins.name: New Note Fixer
Plugins.desc: Unifies the way non-existing notes are created when clicking on their links.

Plugins.name: Note Status
Plugins.desc: Track and change note statuses across your vault with templates, bulk folder actions, dashboards, and non-Markdown support.

Plugins.name: Note Toolbar
Plugins.desc: Add customizable toolbars to your notes.

Plugins.name: Notebook Navigator
Plugins.desc: Replace the default file explorer with a clean two-pane interface featuring folder tree, tag browsing, file previews, keyboard navigation, drag-and-drop, pinned notes, and customizable display options.

Plugins.name: Simple mind map
Plugins.desc: A relatively powerful mind map.

Plugins.name: ObDrawIO
Plugins.desc: Edit and manage draw.io diagrams (.drawio / .dio).

Plugins.name: Advanced Search UI
Plugins.desc: A powerful search UI that provides AND/OR/NOT operators and easy access to search filters.

Plugins.name: Advanced URI
Plugins.desc: Advanced modes for Obsidian URI

Plugins.name: Another Quick Switcher
Plugins.desc: This is an Obsidian plugin which is another choice of Quick switcher.

Plugins.name: Auto Link Title
Plugins.desc: This plugin automatically fetches the titles of links from the web

Plugins.name: Table Collapse Plugin
Plugins.desc: Add a collapse button in the thead of the table.

Plugins.name: Copy Block Link
Plugins.desc: Get links to blocks and headings from Obsidian's right click menu

Plugins.name: Day Planner
Plugins.desc: A day planner with clean UI and readable syntax

Plugins.name: Douban
Plugins.desc: This is a plugin that can import movies/books/musics/notes/games info data from Douban for Obsidian .

Plugins.name: Enhancing Export
Plugins.desc: This is a enhancing export plugin for Obsidian. It allows to export to formats like Html, DOCX, ePub and PDF or Markdown(Hugo) etc.

Plugins.name: Excalidraw
Plugins.desc: Sketch Your Mind. Edit and view Excalidraw drawings. Enter the world of 4D Visual PKM.

Plugins.name: Export Image plugin
Plugins.desc: Easily convert your article to image.

Plugins.name: Front Matter Title
Plugins.desc: Lets you define a title in frontmatter to be displayed as the filename for explorer, graph, search and etc.

Plugins.name: Git
Plugins.desc: Integrate Git version control with automatic backup and other advanced features.

Plugins.name: Heading Shifter
Plugins.desc: Easily Shift and Change markdown headings.

Plugins.name: Image auto upload
Plugins.desc: This plugin uploads images from your clipboard by PicGo

Plugins.name: Image Toolkit
Plugins.desc: This plugin provides some image viewing toolkit.

Plugins.name: Importer
Plugins.desc: Import data from Notion, Evernote, Apple Notes, Microsoft OneNote, Google Keep, Bear, Roam, Textbundle, CSV, and HTML files.

Plugins.name: Kanban
Plugins.desc: Create markdown-backed Kanban boards in Obsidian.

Plugins.name: Latex Suite
Plugins.desc: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements

Plugins.name: Link Converter
Plugins.desc: Scan all your links in the vault and convert them to your desired format.

Plugins.name: Linter
Plugins.desc: Formats and styles your notes. It can be used to format YAML tags, aliases, arrays, and metadata; footnotes; headings; spacing; math blocks; regular markdown contents like list, italics, and bold styles; and more with the use of custom rule options as well.

Plugins.name: Local REST API with MCP
Plugins.desc: A secure REST API and Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for your vault.

Plugins.name: markdown export
Plugins.desc: This is a markdown export plugin for Obsidian.

Plugins.name: Markmind
Plugins.desc: This is a mindmap , outline tool for obsidian.

Plugins.name: Thino
Plugins.desc: Capturing ideas and save them into daily notes. (Closed source)

Plugins.name: Mindmap NextGen
Plugins.desc: View your Markdown as a mindmap

Plugins.name: Opener
Plugins.desc: Open links in new/existing tabs by default. Open PDFs in System App by default. Can open other file formats in System Apps if desired.

Plugins.name: Outliner
Plugins.desc: Work with your lists like in Workflowy or RoamResearch.

Plugins.name: Password Manager
Plugins.desc: A lightweight local password manager with encryption, backup, trash, and import/export support.

Plugins.name: Quiet Outline
Plugins.desc: Make outline quiet and more powerful, including no-auto-expand, rendering heading as markdown, and search support.

Plugins.name: Scroll to Top
Plugins.desc: This is a plugin for Obsidian that adds a button to scroll to the top of the current note.

Plugins.name: Spaced Repetition
Plugins.desc: Fight the forgetting curve by reviewing flashcards & entire notes using spaced repetition. Organize your flashcards into decks and learn only the cards you need to recall.

Plugins.name: Style Settings
Plugins.desc: Offers controls for adjusting theme, plugin, and snippet CSS variables.

Plugins.name: Tasks
Plugins.desc: Track tasks across your vault. Supports due dates, recurring tasks, done dates, sub-set of checklist items, and filtering.

Plugins.name: Title Serial Number Plugin
Plugins.desc: This plugin adds serial numbers to your markdown title.

Plugins.name: Weread
Plugins.desc: Sync Tencent Weread highlights and annotations.

Plugins.name: YOLO
Plugins.desc: Agent-native AI assistant — chat, write, search, orchestrate, all in one.

Plugins.name: Zoom
Plugins.desc: Zoom into heading and lists.

Plugins.name: BRAT
Plugins.desc: Easily install a beta version of a plugin for testing.

Plugins.name: Strange New Worlds
Plugins.desc: Help see how your vault is interconnected with visual indicators.

Plugins.name: Go To Heading
Plugins.desc: Quickly navigate between headings

Plugins.name: Open Gate
Plugins.desc: Embed any website to Obsidian, you have anything you need in one place. You can browse website and take notes at the same time. e.g. Ask ChatGPT and copy the answer directly to your note.

Plugins.name: Open Tab Settings
Plugins.desc: Adds options to customize how tabs are opened, including open in new tab by default, preventing duplicate tabs, and more.

Plugins.name: Page Scroll
Plugins.desc: Page Up|Down|Top|Bottom

Plugins.name: Paste Image Rename and Convert
Plugins.desc: Rename pasted images and convert them to webp or jpg

Plugins.name: PDF++
Plugins.desc: The most Obsidian-native PDF annotation tool ever.

Plugins.name: Periodic Notes
Plugins.desc: Create/manage your daily, weekly, and monthly notes

Plugins.name: Persistent Links
Plugins.desc: Automatically repair internal links to blocks and headings

Plugins.name: Pixel Banner
Plugins.desc: Enhance your notes with customizable banner images, including AI-generated designs and a curated store of downloadable banners. Transform your workspace with visually stunning headers that add context, improve aesthetics, and take your note-taking beyond the ordinary.

Plugins.name: Pocket Bird
Plugins.desc: Add a pet bird to fly around your notes and keep you company!

Plugins.name: POWER MODE
Plugins.desc: Active POWER MODE!!!!

Plugins.name: Pseudocode
Plugins.desc: This is an obsidian plugin that helps to render a LaTeX-style pseudocode inside a code block.

Plugins.name: Quick Explorer
Plugins.desc: Perform file explorer operations (and see your current file path) from the title bar, using the mouse or keyboard

Plugins.name: Quick Plugin Switcher
Plugins.desc: Quickly manage installed and community plugins. The only way to evolve in the jungle of plugins

Plugins.name: Quick Tagger
Plugins.desc: Add and remove tags quickly. Tag search results, bulk tag, and add dedicated buttons/commands for your favorites!

Plugins.name: QuickAdd
Plugins.desc: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

Plugins.name: RSS Dashboard
Plugins.desc: A dashboard for organizing and consuming RSS feeds, YouTube channels, and podcasts with smart tagging, media playback, and seamless content flow.

Plugins.name: Better Search and Replace
Plugins.desc: Enhanced search and replace with regex support, live diff preview, capture groups, and a floating editor bar.

Plugins.name: Sheets Extended
Plugins.desc: Vertical headers, merged cells, and custom css tables with advanced table compatibility

Plugins.name: Sheets Basic
Plugins.desc: Merge markdown table cells.

Plugins.name: Show Whitespace
Plugins.desc: CSS styles and CM6 extensions to highlight whitespace in Source and Live Preview modes.

Plugins.name: Simple Anki Sync
Plugins.desc: The simplest way of syncing simple Flashchards with Anki.

Plugins.name: Slash Commander
Plugins.desc: Customize the slash command list, assign each command an icon.

Plugins.name: SnipDock
Plugins.desc: Toggle, create, rename and reload CSS snippets from a status-bar menu.

Plugins.name: Solve
Plugins.desc: Supercharge your notes with real-time calculations without AI fuss. From dates ('Now + 20 days'), percentages ('10% of 120'), units of measurement ('100cm + 2m'), arithmetic ('10 + 5') and more!

Plugins.name: Tabs
Plugins.desc: Create tabs in your notes.

Plugins.name: Tag Buddy
Plugins.desc: Unlock powerful tag editing features in Reading Mode. Add, remove, and edit tags across your vault, in the active note or a single instance. Use tag summaries to roundup and process tagged content like an inbox.

Plugins.name: Tag Group Manager
Plugins.desc: Manage tag groups and quickly insert tags.

Plugins.name: Tag Wrangler
Plugins.desc: Rename, merge, toggle, and search tags from the tags view

Plugins.name: Task Board
Plugins.desc: Manage all your tasks throughout your vault from a single board and much more...

Plugins.name: Templater
Plugins.desc: Advanced templating and automation using handlebars-like syntax.

Plugins.name: Tick Tones
Plugins.desc: Plays a tone when you tick a checkbox.

Plugins.name: tldraw
Plugins.desc: Create whiteboards, diagrams, and drawings with the official tldraw plugin.

Plugins.name: Tray
Plugins.desc: Run Obsidian from the system tray for customisable window management & global quick notes

Plugins.name: Paste URL into selection
Plugins.desc: Paste URL "into" selected text to create markdown links.

Plugins.name: Various Complements
Plugins.desc: This plugin enables you to complete words like the auto-completion of IDE

Plugins.name: Vault Inspector
Plugins.desc: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files.

Plugins.name: Version Control
Plugins.desc: Create intentional snapshots with meaningful names, in-file branching, side-by-side diffs, timeline search, writing stats, and optional auto-saves.

Plugins.name: Vertical Tabs
Plugins.desc: Offer an alternative view that displays open tabs vertically, allowing users to group and organize tabs for a better navigation experience.

Plugins.name: Virtual Linker / Glossary
Plugins.desc: Automatically creates virtual links for text within your notes that match the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault. Create a glossary-like functionality, show unlinked mentions and transform them to real links.

Plugins.name: Workspaces Plus
Plugins.desc: Quickly switch and manage workspaces

Plugins.name: XMind Linker
Plugins.desc: View XMind files in your vault and connect to XMind software for editing.

Plugins.name: Zhihu
Plugins.desc: Enable you to publish your articles and answers to Zhihu

Plugins.name: Zotero Citations
Plugins.desc: Zotero citation management with Word export via Pandoc.

Plugins.name: 间隔保存工作区
Plugins.desc: 每隔指定时间自动保存工作区布局

Plugins.name: Fullscreen mode plugin
Plugins.desc: This plugin allows viewing a single document in fullscreen focus mode

Plugins.name: Pure Footnote
Plugins.desc: A clean sidebar tool to manage footnotes and annotations, supporting synchronized highlighting and editing.
